title: Intercollegiate Sports
description: NYU Shanghai competes with student-athletes from universities across Shanghai and in city collegiate federation events, leagues, and competitions during the academic year. The university fields teams in several sports, including soccer, basketball, volleyball, table tennis, badminton and tennis.
text:
Intercollegiate Sports
NYU Shanghai competes with student-athletes from universities across Shanghai and in city collegiate federation events, leagues, and competitions during the academic year. The university fields teams in several sports, including soccer, basketball, volleyball, table tennis, badminton and tennis. Students are encouraged to try out for teams to develop their skills and represent NYU Shanghai to the greater Shanghai community.
See Our Teams
For more information on competitive sports, please email shanghai.athletics@nyu.edu.
